nasb.text: When you beat your olive tree, you shall not go over the boughs again; it shall be for the alien, for the orphan, and for the widow.

esv.text: When you beat your olive trees, you shall not go over them again. It shall be for the sojourner, the fatherless, and the widow.

cnv.text: 你打橄欖樹以後，枝上剩下的不可再打，要留給寄居的、孤兒和寡婦。

ccb.text: 你们打橄榄时，打过一次后不可再打，要把剩下的留给孤儿寡妇和寄居者。
